description:
🕒 16:00–18:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-ikimonobu-tenranzan-summer/

Walk with a guide and discover the natural changes you might miss on an ordinary stroll. This is a short, easy-to-enjoy tour. Please join us! Depending on the season, you may receive homegrown pesticide-free vegetables as a gift.

【Fee】¥2,000 per person; ¥1,500 for repeat visitors; ¥4,000 per family (includes guide and insurance)

【Capacity】Up to 10 people per date

【Guide】Tsubasa Kojima (Hanno City Eco-Tourism Citizen Guide Association, Wildlife Group)

【What to bring】Drinks, rain gear, backpack or similar (something that leaves both hands free is recommended), towel, insect repellent spray
location: 集合 飯能市立博物館前（国際興業バス「OH!!!・天覧山下」または「市民会館・博物館」下車徒歩3分）
summary: Easy Evening Tour of Tenranzan Mountain
